title: Weapons
description: A small resource pack that adds the ability to change the appearance of swords and axes by renaming them on the anvil.
body:
# Titles for renaming
### Most subjects support translation into the following languages:English, Русский, Українська мова, 日本語
<details>
<summary>Any sword</summary>

- Curved_sword, Изогнутый меч, Вигнутий меч, 曲刀
- Hammer, Молот, Молот, ハンマー
- Katana, Катана, Катана, カタナ
- Mace, Булава, Булава, メイス
- Spear, Копьё, Спис, スピア
- Holy sword, Святой меч, Святий меч, 聖剣
- Staff of Marsil, Посох Марсиль, Посох Марсіль, フリーレンの魔法杖
- Nightskulk
- Notchcleaver

</details>

<details>
<summary>Any axe</summary>

- Battle axe, Боевой топор, Бойова сокира, バトルアックス

</details>

### ❗️For 3D models to work you must have OptiFine installed, if you are with Fabric, use the mod: [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or the other two mods: [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

![png](https://i.imgur.com/jMVUbx7.png)
# Appearance
### A small part of the weapons have several texture variations in different hands, in the future I will try to add this chip to each item

![png](https://i.imgur.com/k1G5UCI.png)

I saw how many people download this resource packs and so I decided to resume work on it and will add new items, I will try as often as possible, thank you ＠＾▽＾＠. If there will be problems in rp or want to rewrite this or that translation, write me in discord: bako_0

Most likely some of the old models will be redone because I don't like the way they look anymore, after all I made them two years ago.
